_comment: Your active monthly budget. Edit these as your situation changes. 'discretionary_categories' are the ones the daily/weekly safe-to-spend number is calculated from — the flexible stuff you control day to day. Set 'rollover': true for envelope-style budgeting: last month's discretionary surplus/overspend carries into this month's safe-to-spend pool. 'rollover_start' (YYYY-MM) is the first month that counts — set it to when you began budgeting.
